name: tockExternalIntegrationAttribute
description: tockExternalIntegrationAttribute schema from Tock Guest Model

businessId.description: A unique identifier for the business. Used internally by Tock.

patronId.description: A unique identifier for the patron that will be the same as Patron.id. Used internally by Tock.

type.description: The name of the external system this attribute originated from.

attribute.description: The name of the attribute assigned to this guest in the external system.

stringValue.description: If the attribute value is a string type, this field will be the resulting value of the attribute.

intValue.description: If the attribute value is a number type, this field will be the resulting value of the attribute.
